title: C Fermented Cottage Cheese Stir-fry Fondue-pot
description: A realistic recipe for a Norwegian dish featuring fermented cottage cheese, stir-fried with basil leaves and halal-friendly in a fondue pot.
instructions: Heat the fondue pot over medium heat.
Add fermented cottage cheese and stir until well combined, scraping any stuck bits from the bottom.
Deglaze with halal-friendly broth or stock, letting it simmer briefly to concentrate flavors.
Stir in a handful of basil leaves, ensuring they wilt slightly but are not soggy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately as fondue for solo dining experience.
